ItacPersonItem.Notes: Teacher of philosophy and medicine in the Bolognese Studium. See his biography by Mario Tronti in DBI; see also Lucia Rodler, Camillo Baldi e la teoria delle missive, in Id. I silenzi mimici del volto (Pisa, 1991)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
